pr.title: feat(home): schedule-aware status pill in HKT
pr.body: ## Summary Replace the static `available for work` string in the topbar with a self-updating state machine driven by **Hong Kong wall-clock time** (UTC+8, no DST). The pill re-evaluates every 60 s and fades smoothly between states. ## State table | When (HKT) | Dot | Text | |---|---|---| | MonвЂ“Fri **08:00вЂ“22:00** | рџџў green | `online В· HKT` | | MonвЂ“Fri **22:00вЂ“24:00** | рџ”µ cyan | `wrapping up В· HKT` | | MonвЂ“Fri **00:00вЂ“08:00** | вљЄ gray | `offline В· back 08:00 HKT` | | Sat / Sun **09:00вЂ“22:00** | рџџЎ amber | `weekend В· slow replies` | | Sat **22вЂ“24** / Sun **00вЂ“09** / Sat **00вЂ“09** | вљЄ gray | `offline В· back 09:00 HKT` | | Sun **22:00вЂ“24:00** | вљЄ gray | `offline В· back monday` | Right now (Sun 02:00 UTC в†’ Sun 10:00 HKT) the pill should be showing **amber В· weekend В· slow replies**. ## Implementation notes - **Zero dependencies.** Time is computed by shifting `Date.now()` by +8 h and reading via UTC accessors вЂ” robust to the visitor's local timezone and any DST in their locale. - New state classes `.s-green` / `.s-cyan` / `.s-amber` / `.s-gray` / `.s-purple` flip a single `--state-color` custom property. The live dot picks it up via `color` + `text-shadow` and keeps its existing pulse animation. - 280 ms fade-swap on each transition so the change feels intentional, not jittery. - Text node wrapped in `вЂ¦` so JS swaps content without touching the dot or the pulse. - Title tooltip: *"status follows Hong Kong wall-clock time, refreshed every minute"*. ## Verification - Dry-run of `pickState()` across every weekday Г— 11 sample hours: state grid matches the table above; no off-by-one at the 08/09/22 boundaries. - `GET /` в†’ 200 (81 KB). - HTML tag balance: clean. - Inline JS: `node --check` OK. ## Easy follow-ups (not in this PR) - Tweak `WAKE_WEEKDAY_HM` / `WAKE_WEEKEND_HM` constants if you want different "online" windows. - Add a one-off override (e.g. a `data-status="vacation"` attribute or a small "manual override" branch) when you want to pin a state for travel / interviews / etc.
pr.author: blueyi
